description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the docker:latest Docker image with a docker:dind service and defines the variables CANONICAL_NAME as ${REGISTRY}/${CI_PROJECT_NAMESPACE}/${CI_PROJECT_NAME}, PROJECT_NAME as ${CI_PROJECT_NAMESPACE}/${CI_PROJECT_NAME}, and REGISTRY as registry.gitlab.com. Define two stages, build and rebuild. In the build stage add a docker:build job that runs the exact script: docker login -u gitlab-ci-token -p ${CI_BUILD_TOKEN} ${REGISTRY}; docker build . -t ${CANONICAL_NAME}:latest -t ${CANONICAL_NAME}; docker push ${CANONICAL_NAME}:latest; VERSION=$(docker run ${CANONICAL_NAME} docker-compose -v | grep -o '\d\+\.\d\+\.\d\+'); docker tag ${CANONICAL_NAME} ${CANONICAL_NAME}:${VERSION}; docker push ${CANONICAL_NAME}:${VERSION}. In the rebuild stage add a docker:rebuild job that uses the same script, is manual (when: manual), and runs after the rebuild stage.
